institution.name: Pontifical Catholic University of Puerto Rico-Ponce
institution.address: 2250 Boulevard Luis A. Ferre Aguayo Suite 608

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Pontifical Catholic University of Puerto Rico-Ponce vs the 2003–2007 baseline (3.8k vs 5.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pontifical Catholic University of Puerto Rico-Ponce rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.5k → $6.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pontifical Catholic University of Puerto Rico-Ponce rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.5k → $6.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Pontifical Catholic University of Puerto Rico-Ponce rose 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.0k → $15.5k).
